title: Gooey Smoky Rye Sandwich
description: A low-calorie-friendly smoky and gooey Mediterranean dish featuring a nutritious blend of ingredients that are perfect for a sick-day meal.
instructions: Spray the inside of a rye bread slice with olive oil spray.
On a flat surface, knead together cheddar cheese and salt until combined. Adjust seasoning if necessary with pepper and extra salt as desired.
Place the kneaded mixture on top of one side of the sprayed rye bread.
Cover the other side of the sandwich with the avocado spread, if using.
Place the assembled sandwich in a baking dish or directly onto the oven rack. Bake for 5-7 minutes or until cheese is fully melted and bread is golden brown.
Remove from heat and let cool for about 2 minutes before serving.
